title: Cairn Under the Broken Moon
target: answer the bog-touched envoy at the cairn — kill, bargain, or be carried back into the reeds

contributions.line: [mock] Marek (Male) takes on "stand the envoy's first reach, eye to the cracked-clay mask".
[mock] Imogen (Female) takes on "name the bog-thing in the old tongue, the one that costs to say".
[mock] Veska (Female) takes on "hold the salt-ring closed while the reeds bend the wrong way".

outcomeNarrative: [mock] A bruised partial; answer the bog-touched envoy at the cairn — kill, bargain, or be carried back into the reeds slips half-grasped, but no one is broken.
